operator_summary: Proved autonomy improvement `remote-manifest-only-startup-stall-recovery-v1` from `algosec-diagnostic-framework-build-pack-v1`. Adopted surfaces: materializer_defaults. Pending surfaces: source_template_tracking.
summary: Pre-invocation remote startup stalls now preserve a manifest-only pull result plus recovery-remote-state snapshot instead of failing during pullback.

notes: This is the main automatic inheritance path for future build-packs.
When an autonomy improvement lands here, newly materialized build-packs receive it by default.
This records whether the source template itself has been updated to describe or carry the improvement.
Pending here means the improvement may still be inherited through factory tooling without being reflected directly in the template source.
